\E3* I..^1. won't always be there to take care of you./
\E3* Please..^1. stay out of trouble^1, okay?/

obj_room_krishallway_slash_Step_0_gml_26: * You quickly look away^1. Who is that?/%
obj_room_krishallway_slash_Step_0_gml_63: * (You opened the drawer and looked at How to Draw Dragons.)/
obj_room_krishallway_slash_Step_0_gml_64: * (The cover's inappropriately dressed purple dragon stares back at you.)/
obj_room_krishallway_slash_Step_0_gml_65: * (..^1. even though there was a Dark World in your house...)/
obj_room_krishallway_slash_Step_0_gml_66: * (..^1. you didn't seem to meet a Darkner based on this object.)/

obj_room_krishallway_slash_Step_0_gml_84: * (You opened the drawer and shut it^1. Some things should stay closed.)/%

obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_25_0: * (You should probably clean this up sometime.)/%
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0: * (If you go back to sleep^1^1, \cYyou may miss a lot of important things\cW.)/
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_185_0: * (Your brother's drawer^1. There are various unsent love letters inside.)/
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_209_0: * (..^1. your body is still shaky^1, and feels weak^1, almost unfamiliar.)/
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_210_0: * (Despite your weakness^1, will you really make your first priority)/
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_214_0: * (As if you haven't read them before?)/
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_242_0: * (Despite your weakness^1, you proceed to open the first letter.)/
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_244_0: * (Your weakness gets the better of you^1. Letter dropped^1. Drawer closed.)/%
obj_room_krisroom_slash_Step_0_gml_271_0: * (You remember it was originally intended for a console music game.)/%
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_16_0: * (Well^1, there is not a man here.)/%
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_38_0: * (Well^1, there is not a man here.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_39_0: * (..^1. but^1, on Kris's shoulder^1, a weight remained.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_40_0: * (A weight that carried far^1, far^1, into the distance...)/%
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_100_0: * (Well^1, the man put his hand softly on your shoulder.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_104_0: * (He put his finger to his mouth^1, smiled^1, and shook his head.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_108_0: * (He put his finger to his mouth^1, smiled^1, and nodded his head.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_112_0: * (He waved goodbye^1, looking away slightly after a moment.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_115_0: * (It was a feeling that they should not look for the man anymore.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_116_0: * (..^1. even though they had never done such a thing in the first place.)/%
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_125_0: * (In fact^1, it seemed very much like this tree.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_126_0: * (Craning your head^1, you noticed that there was another tree after that.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_127_0: * (It felt a little bit like looking into series of mirrors...)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_129_0: * (..^1. the man saw this and looked concerned.)/
obj_room_man_slash_Step_0_gml_130_0: * (He seemed like he wanted to speak^1, but...)/
obj_room_schoollobby_slash_Step_0_gml_30: * (Also^1, there are crumbs around your face for some reason.)/%
